modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use mobile-first platforms, metro, campus/work pressure, super-app payments, livestream/gaming, recommendations, and IP culture while avoiding direct system-critique framing.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Cyberpunk should make today's interface life slightly more literal: recommendation feeds, biometric locks, avatars, backups, payment systems, and surveillance.

catalyst.logline: A game avatar signs a contract while the protagonist sleeps, and the city recognizes the avatar as the more valid citizen.

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=zh_CN; audience=gen_z. Use catalyst 'avatar_fork_legal_person': A game avatar signs a contract while the protagonist sleeps, and the city recognizes the avatar as the more valid citizen. Transmutation: Avatar identity becomes legal threat. Market surface: Use mobile-first platforms, metro, campus/work pressure, super-app payments, livestream/gaming, recommendations, and IP culture while avoiding direct system-critique framing. Audience rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture. Use concrete objects and social pressure on page one; do not name-drop trends.
